name: gtm-advisor
description:
Advises on go-to-market strategy, positioning, pricing, and customer research.
Use when: launching products, positioning against competitors, pricing decisions,
understanding customer needs, or conducting user research. Includes: Champion
Persona, Five Component Positioning, JTBD Interviews, Four Forces, Willingness
to Pay frameworks.
Sources: April Dunford, Bob Moesta, Madhavan Ramanujam.
